# Plannivo

> Plannivo is a watersports academy management platform offering bookings, CRM, finances, instructors, inventory, rentals, and more.

## About

Plannivo is a business management platform for watersports academies. It handles lesson bookings, customer management, financial tracking, instructor scheduling, equipment rentals, inventory, and a gear shop. The platform supports membership programs, group bookings, digital waivers, and community management.

## Pages

- [Login](https://akyaka.plannivo.com/login): Sign in to the Plannivo platform.
- [Shop](https://akyaka.plannivo.com/shop): Watersports gear and accessories shop.
- [Browse Products](https://akyaka.plannivo.com/shop/browse): Browse and filter the full product catalog.
- [Membership Packages](https://akyaka.plannivo.com/members/offerings): Membership offerings and exclusive packages.
- [Help & Support](https://akyaka.plannivo.com/help): Help center and support resources.
